curriculumRef.value: NCE Chemistry Year 1 — CHE 111 General Chemistry

blocks.title: Isotopes

citations.excerpt: Isotopes are atoms with the same atomic number but different mass numbers. For example, Hydrogen has three isotopes: Protium, Deuterium, and Tritium.

blocks.text: Isotopes are atoms of the same element with the same atomic number but different mass numbers. Hydrogen, for example, has three isotopes: protium, deuterium, and tritium.
